heading: Aviation cadets; benefits
label: 2318 Aviation cadets; benefits
text: Except as provided in , aviation cadets or their beneficiaries are entitled to the same allowances, pensions, gratuities, and other benefits as are provided for enlisted members in pay grade E–4. While on active duty, an aviation cadet is entitled to uniforms, clothing, and equipment at the expense of the United States.section 402(c) of title 37
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 372 of this title
